name: Deviled Mushroom Compote
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sweet red peppers, thinly sliced
1/2 cup sweet green peppers, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-low heat.
2. Add onions and peppers to the skillet, and sauté until soft.
3. Add mushrooms to the skillet, and continue sautéing until they begin to soften.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients (wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, brown sugar, and raisins) in a bowl.
5. Stir the mixed ingredients into the skillet with the onions, peppers, and mushrooms.
6. Increase the heat to medium-high, and bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Cook, stirring often, until the mixture thickens and becomes syrupy.
